# MPSGraphRandomDistribution.uniform

**Case**

The uniform distribution, with samples drawn uniformly from [min, max) for float types, and [min, max] for integer types.

## Declaration

```swift
case uniform
```
title: MPSGraphRandomDistribution.uniform
